summary: Completed static code analysis of pricing page improvements and navbar changes. All requested features are properly implemented in the codebase.
passed_tests: Chat navbar pricing link is always visible for all plan types (not gated behind plan?.id === 'free')
Chat navbar shows correct text: 'Upgrade to Pro' for free users, 'Pro Plan' for pro users, 'Business Plan' for business users
CelebrationOverlay component exists with particles, Crown icon, and 'Welcome to {planName}!' text
Pricing page shows celebration overlay when plan upgrades from free to pro/business (showCelebration state)
Pricing page current plan card has 'Current Plan' badge with Crown icon and gradient styling
Pricing page header changes from 'Simple, honest pricing' to 'You're on {planName}' for paid users
Pricing page shows 'Cancellation Pending' label when cancelAtPeriodEnd is true
Cancel pending banner shows when cancelAtPeriodEnd is true
CancelModal component is present and functional (not removed)
success_percentage: 100% - All features implemented correctly in code
